title: millotia hispidula
intro: Millotia hispidula, also known as hairy millotia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Australia. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Millotia hispidula is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Millotia hispidula can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, with some herbalists also using it in salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
